overview.name: spring-rest-sakila
overview.purpose: A Spring Boot 3 application that exposes a hypermedia-driven REST API over the Sakila sample database, a DVD-rental domain covering films, actors, customers, inventory, rentals and payments. It demonstrates a production-shaped read/write API with authentication, caching, and generated OpenAPI/Postman documentation.
overview.architecture_summary: Package-by-feature (vertical slice) architecture. Each business capability (catalog, rental, customer, payment, location, auth) is a self-contained module holding its own controller, service interface + implementation, Spring Data repository (often extended with a custom QueryDSL/Blaze-Persistence fragment), JPA entity, DTOs, MapStruct mappers, and HATEOAS assemblers. Cross-cutting concerns (security, persistence, Redis, logging) live in a top-level config package.
key_components: catalog — films, actors, categories; the richest module, with filtered/paginated QueryDSL queries
rental — rent/return DVD workflows over inventory
payment — payment records and reporting projections
auth — JPA-backed user details, roles, and method-level security
config — security filter chain, persistence, Redis, logging filters
entry_points: REST controllers mounted under context path /api/v1 (e.g. /films, /rentals, /customers, /payments)
Spring Security filter chain in config.SecurityFilterConfig
notable_patterns: Layered controller → service → repository → entity flow within each feature slice
DTO + MapStruct mapping to decouple the API contract from JPA entities
HATEOAS RepresentationModelAssembler classes to attach hypermedia links
Custom repository fragments (QueryDSL + Blaze-Persistence) for type-safe dynamic queries
Declarative caching via @Cacheable/@CachePut/@CacheEvict backed by Redis
Method-level authorization via @Secured with role constants
JPA AttributeConverters for enum/domain value objects (FilmRating, Category, UserRole)
potential_risks: Complexity concentrates in the custom QueryDSL repository implementations and in entity equals()/hashCode() (FilmEntity.equals has cyclomatic complexity 16) rather than in controllers/services, which stay thin.
Heavy use of Lombok and generated QueryDSL Q-types means the build must run annotation processing (kapt) before the code is fully analyzable.
Cache keys are defined per-method; eviction correctness depends on keeping @CacheEvict in sync with write paths.

insight.summary: REST controller exposing CRUD and relationship endpoints for films under /films, returning HATEOAS models and enforcing role-based access.

key_methods.name: getFilmList
key_methods.signature: public ResponseEntity<CollectionModel<FilmDto.FilmResponse>> getFilmList(String category, String releaseYear, String rating, Pageable pageable)
key_methods.description: Lists films with optional category/releaseYear/rating filters and pagination, building a FilterOption and returning a hypermedia collection.

key_methods.name: getFilm
key_methods.description: Fetches a single film by id, mapping to a HATEOAS model or returning 404 when absent.

key_methods.name: addFilm
key_methods.description: Creates a film and returns 201 with a Location header pointing at the new resource.

key_methods.name: updateFilm
key_methods.signature: public ResponseEntity<Void> updateFilm(Integer filmId, FilmDto.FilmRequest model)
key_methods.description: Updates an existing film; restricted to the MANAGE role.

noteworthy: Every endpoint is guarded by @Secured with ROLE_READ / ROLE_MANAGE constants.
Uses WebMvcLinkBuilder (linkTo/methodOn) to construct self/relation links.
Delegates all data work to FilmService; controller stays thin.

insight.summary: Transactional service implementation for the film catalog; orchestrates repository access, DTO mapping, and Redis-backed caching.

key_methods.name: getFilmList
key_methods.signature: public List<FilmDto.Film> getFilmList(FilmDto.FilterOption condition, Pageable pageable)
key_methods.description: Returns a filtered or unfiltered paginated film list, choosing the query path based on whether all filter fields are null.

key_methods.name: getFilm
key_methods.description: Fetches a film by id, throwing ResourceNotFoundException when missing; result cached in 'filmResponseCache' keyed by filmId.

key_methods.name: addFilm
key_methods.description: Persists a new film from the request DTO and returns the created record.

noteworthy: @Transactional(readOnly = true) on query methods; write methods use read/write transactions.
Declarative caching with @Cacheable/@CachePut/@CacheEvict keeps read and write paths consistent.
Constructor injection via Lombok @RequiredArgsConstructor.

insight.summary: Custom repository fragment implementing type-safe dynamic film queries with QueryDSL and Blaze-Persistence, including filtering, joins, and projections.

key_methods.name: findAllFilmList
key_methods.description: Fetches a paginated list of films via a QueryDSL selectFrom with offset/limit, mapping entities to DTOs.

key_methods.name: findAllFilmListWithFilter
key_methods.description: Builds a dynamic query joining film category and applying null-safe equality filters on category, release year, and rating.

noteworthy: Uses generated Q-types (QFilmEntity, QFilmCategoryEntity) — requires annotation processing before compile.
Null-safe predicates via a shared ExpressionUtils.filterEquals helper.
Mixes JPAQueryFactory and BlazeJPAQueryFactory for advanced pagination/CTE support.

insight.summary: JPA entity mapping the sakila.film table, with validation constraints, enum converters, auditing timestamps, and a hand-written equals/hashCode.

key_methods.name: equals
key_methods.description: Field-by-field equality across all mapped columns; the highest-complexity method in the file (CC 16) due to the number of nullable fields compared.

key_methods.name: update
key_methods.description: Implements the Updatable contract to copy mutable fields from another instance for update flows.

noteworthy: Complexity hotspot: FilmEntity.equals has cyclomatic complexity 16 — a candidate for simplification via Objects.equals or a key-based equality.
Declares explicit table indexes and uses @Convert for FilmRating/SpecialFeature/Language value objects.
@UpdateTimestamp + @ColumnDefault manage auditing and defaults.

insight.summary: MapStruct mapper interface declaring the entity↔DTO conversions for films; the implementation is generated at build time.

key_methods.name: mapToDto
key_methods.description: Maps a FilmEntity to its API DTO; MapStruct generates the field-copy implementation.

key_methods.name: mapToDtoList
key_methods.description: Batch mapping of film entities to DTOs.

noteworthy: Zero cyclomatic complexity because it is an interface — behaviour is in generated code.
componentModel = "spring" so the generated mapper is an injectable bean.

insight.summary: REST controller for rental operations, exposing DVD rent/return workflows and rental lookups under /rentals.

key_methods.name: rentDvd
key_methods.description: Initiates a DVD rental for a customer/inventory pair and returns the created rental location.

key_methods.name: returnDvd
key_methods.description: Marks a rental as returned, updating return timestamp state.

noteworthy: Encapsulates a stateful business workflow (rent/return) behind REST semantics.
Role-secured like the rest of the API.

insight.summary: Spring Security configuration defining the HTTP security filter chain, authentication entry points, and authorization rules for the API.

key_methods.name: filterChain
key_methods.description: Builds the security filter chain: authorization rules, session policy, and authentication mechanism for the REST API.

noteworthy: Central place where method-level @Secured roles are backed by an HTTP security policy.
@Configuration bean wired into the Spring Security infrastructure.

insight.summary: Spring Security UserDetailsService backed by JPA, loading users and their authorities from the database for authentication.

key_methods.name: loadUserByUsername
key_methods.description: Loads a user and granted authorities by username, throwing UsernameNotFoundException when absent.

key_methods.name: findUser
key_methods.description: Helper that resolves the user entity and maps roles to Spring Security authorities.

noteworthy: Bridges the JPA AuthorityEntity/UserRole model to Spring Security's UserDetails contract.
Foundation for the method-level @Secured authorization used across controllers.

insight.summary: HATEOAS assembler that converts Actor DTOs into RepresentationModels enriched with self and relation hypermedia links.

key_methods.name: toModel
key_methods.description: Wraps an actor DTO with self and related links (e.g. the actor's films).

key_methods.name: toCollectionModel
key_methods.signature: public CollectionModel<ActorDto.ActorResponse> toCollectionModel(Iterable<? extends ActorDto.Actor> entities)
key_methods.description: Assembles a hypermedia collection of actors with collection-level links.

noteworthy: Keeps hypermedia link logic out of controllers and services.
Extends RepresentationModelAssemblerSupport for consistent link building.

insight.summary: Transactional service for payment records, providing lookups, detail projections, and aggregation used by reporting endpoints.

key_methods.name: getPaymentDetails
key_methods.description: Retrieves a detailed payment view (joining customer/staff/rental) or empty when not found.

key_methods.name: getPaymentList
key_methods.description: Returns a paginated list of payments mapped to DTOs.

noteworthy: Read-mostly service leaning on custom projections for reporting.
Consistent with the catalog/rental service pattern (thin controller, mapping in service/repo).
